forecast.name: Tonight
forecast.detailedForecast: Freezing rain and areas of fog before midnight, then rain and areas of fog and a chance of freezing rain between midnight and 1am, then freezing rain and areas of fog between 1am and 3am, then areas of fog and a chance of freezing rain. Cloudy, with a low around 30. Northwest wind around 7 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New ice accumulation of less than half an inch possible.

forecast.name: Wednesday
forecast.shortForecast: Areas Of Fog then Mostly Sunny
forecast.detailedForecast: Areas of fog before 8am. Mostly sunny. High near 51, with temperatures falling to around 45 in the afternoon. West wind around 7 mph. Little or no ice accumulation expected.

weather_report:
As the clock strikes the late hours of the night, Boston finds itself cloaked in a chilling shroud of freezing rain, combining with sweeping areas of fog that further obscure the city's silhouette against the dim backdrop. The air carries an unsettled chill, nudging the temperature to a hesitant 30 degrees. A whispering northwest wind weaves through the streets, urging passersby to brace themselves against the potential icy remnants still to come. With a notable chance of precipitation lingering, one might consider staying indoors, perhaps wrapped in a soft blanket with a hot cup of tea while the world outside glistens covertly under its frost.

As dawn breaks, a promise of clarity unfolds. The forecast hints at a transformation when Wednesday arrives; the morning may still present vestiges of fog, but the sun promises to peek out, casting warm, golden rays that will eventually chase away the remnants of the chill. As the temperature rises toward a more inviting 51 degrees, the afternoon will reclaim the warmth that the early morning has postponed. It would be wise to wear layers today, starting with a cozy sweater beneath a resistant outer shell, which might just guard against the residual dampness lurking in the shadows. Those venturing out might find simple joys in the neighborhood cafés, indulging in a warm pastry or taking a brisk, refreshing stroll as Boston trails into a brighter afternoon.
